subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-i-Ba'd-i-Mírzá! We have, at this hour, turned unto thee and manifested unto thee the pearls of the ocean's shells [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد بعد میرزا قد اقبلنا الیک فی هذا الحین و اظهرنا لک لئالی اصداف بحر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for nearness to God
